// SOURCE:      while (true) {
// SOURCE-NEXT:   console.log("Should not be eliminated");
// SOURCE-NEXT: }
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: Prelude:
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-EMPTY:
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: Dataflow:
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: jsir.file ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:   ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:       // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:       // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:     jsir.program {"script"} ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:       ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         jshir.while_statement ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:           ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             %0 = jsir.boolean_literal {false}
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // %0 = false
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             jsir.expr_region_end (%0)
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         }, {
// SOURCE-NEXT:           ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // <not executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             jshir.block_statement ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:               ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // <not executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %0 = jsir.identifier {"console"}
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %0 = <uninitialized>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %1 = jsir.member_expression (%0) {#jsir<identifier   <L 2 C 12>, <L 2 C 15>, "log", 26, 29, 2, "log">}
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %1 = <uninitialized>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %2 = jsir.string_literal {#jsir<string_literal_extra "\22To be eliminated\22", "To be eliminated">, "To be eliminated"}
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %2 = <uninitialized>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %3 = jsir.call_expression (%1, %2)
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %3 = <uninitialized>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 jsir.expression_statement (%3)
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             }, {
// SOURCE-NEXT:               ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // <not executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             })
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         })
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         jshir.while_statement ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:           ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             %0 = jsir.boolean_literal {true}
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // %0 = true
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             jsir.expr_region_end (%0)
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         }, {
// SOURCE-NEXT:           ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             jshir.block_statement ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:               ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %0 = jsir.identifier {"console"}
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %0 = <unknown>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %1 = jsir.member_expression (%0) {#jsir<identifier   <L 6 C 12>, <L 6 C 15>, "log", 79, 82, 4, "log">}
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %1 = <unknown>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %2 = jsir.string_literal {#jsir<string_literal_extra "\22Should not be eliminated\22", "Should not be eliminated">, "Should not be eliminated"}
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %2 = "Should not be eliminated"
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 %3 = jsir.call_expression (%1, %2)
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // %3 = <unknown>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 jsir.expression_statement (%3)
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             }, {
// SOURCE-NEXT:               ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             })
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         })
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:     }, {
// SOURCE-NEXT:       ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:     })
// SOURCE-NEXT:       // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT: })
// SOURCE-NEXT:   // State [default = <uninitialized>] { }
